name: Uncle Ben's Seasoned Long Grain & Wild Rice M
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine all the ingredients from the Dry Mix section.
2. Add water and butter or margarine to the dry mixture.
3. Bring to a boil, stirring once or twice to combine.
4. Cover the pan tightly with a lid and simmer gently for 8 to 10 minutes, or until almost all liquid has been absorbed.
5. Makes 3 cups cooked rice.
